global_description: Large marine mammal with streamlined, elongated body, smooth skin, predominantly gray or blue, featuring a dorsal fin, flippers, and a large tail fluke. The head is often massive with a prominent blowhole on top.

part_details.head: Massive with a prominent blowhole on top
part_details.dorsal fin: Located on the back, varies in size
part_details.flippers: Pair of pectoral fins on sides

spatial_relations: Head at front, tail fluke at rear
Dorsal fin on top of body
